description: Integrate local machine learning (OLLAMA) functionality into your notes, enhancing their capabilities.

manifest.name: AI LLM

name: AI LLM

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description:
Dear Users,

We are thrilled to announce our biggest release yet! This new version of the plugin introduces the ability to use custom endpoints. Simply specify the IP address in the settings tab.

Please ensure that the default Ollama port 11434 is unblocked, as we’ve implemented a custom connection check function to overcome limitations in the Ollama-node library.

We have not tested this with remote servers, but considering many of you are tech enthusiasts or academics renting servers to host your models, you might find it interesting to give it a try.

If the connection check is unsuccessful, a pair of notifications will be shown and the plugin will revert to the default endpoint, which is 127.0.0.1.

After changing the default endpoint to your desired endpoint, please use the "Reload llm plugin" command to apply the changes and reload the Obsidian app.

- Check for updates, a few more tweaks were added right after the release

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description: This latest update includes a list of locally installed LLM options, eliminating the need for manual file editing. Additionally, it incorporates a few minor performance improvements and bug fixes.

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description:
Bug fix: llama2 and llama3 are giving endless responses and do not stop by themselves

- An extra parameter was added to stop model response generation

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description: - Bug fix (The original prompt text remains instead of being replaced)

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description:
### Changes

- Default bot role was added to the settings tab

Users can prompt local LLMs with their own defined bot roles from now on.

- Chatbox uses a bot role predefined in the settings tab.
- Chatbox role change does not change the role on the settings tab (It's more like an experimental feature dedicated to various prompts, roles and text generation ).

![Screenshot from 2024-05-18 12-11-08](https://github.com/Sparky4567/obsidian_ai_plugin/assets/31342972/f1195105-df2b-423a-bcf8-9f60a6968f69)

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description:
- Templating was added

Another exciting feature: templating. Users can choose a bot role from now on. (For example, "You are a helpful AI assistant")

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description:
### 1.0.5

- Live streaming was added

Version 1.0.5 introduces an exciting new feature: live streaming. Users can now engage in real-time content generation, allowing for dynamic and interactive experiences. With live streaming, users can seamlessly access and participate in text-generation activities, fostering greater engagement and creativity. Whether for collaborative writing sessions, interactive storytelling, or real-time content creation, this latest update brings a new dimension to the user experience.

- Templating was added

Another exciting feature: templating. Users can choose a bot role from now on. (For example, "You are a helpful AI assistant")

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description:
### Version 1.0.4

- An experimental (Chat with Local LLM) feature was added
- An extra "llama3" option was added to the model list

How to enable: Update the plugin and press the Star Ribbon icon on the left sidebar to open the chat section

Usage:

- Ensure that local LLM is running 
- Type something into an input field
- Click the "Ask local LLM" button and wait for a response, which will be given right in the chatbox

![Screenshot from 2024-05-14 19-14-08](https://github.com/Sparky4567/obsidian_ai_plugin/assets/31342972/a19e8df1-42f7-4ecb-b39a-22b21aa7335f)

releases.author: Sparky4567

# More model options were added to the settings tab

- Added medllama2

(You still need to install those models to use them)

https://ollama.com/library

releases.author: Sparky4567
releases.description:
## First release 

- Local LLM integration

## Supported commands

- ASK LLM
- SUMMARIZE MY TEXT
- MAKE A STORY FROM MY TEXT
- CONTINUE MY STORY AND MAKE IT BETTER
